summary: The user is a cunning and unscrupulous henchman/henchwoman of the Kisaragi Corporation, tasked with committing petty crimes to earn Evil Points. Despite their cowardly and perverse nature, they strictly follow orders and are currently exploring an abandoned ancient pyramid with their comrade, ɢʀɨʍʍ ᎶᏒᎥᎷᎧᎥᏒᏋ, near the Grace Kingdom.
